mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ai_api_index (id, project_id, api_id, api_name, api_path, api_method, api_info, indexed_status, error_msg, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{id}, #{projectId}, #{apiId}, #{apiName}, #{apiPath}, #{apiMethod}, #{apiInfo}, #{indexedStatus}, #{errorMsg}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
mapper.select: SELECT id, project_id as projectId, api_id as apiId, api_name as apiName, api_path as apiPath, api_method as apiMethod, api_info as apiInfo, indexed_status as indexedStatus, error_msg as errorMsg, create_time as createTime, update_time as updateTime FROM ai_api_index WHERE id = #{id}

SELECT id, project_id as projectId, api_id as apiId, api_name as apiName, api_path as apiPath, api_method as apiMethod, api_info as apiInfo, indexed_status as indexedStatus, error_msg as errorMsg, create_time as createTime, update_time as updateTime FROM ai_api_index WHERE project_id = #{projectId} ORDER BY update_time DESC

SELECT id, project_id as projectId, api_id as apiId, api_name as apiName, api_path as apiPath, api_method as apiMethod, api_info as apiInfo, indexed_status as indexedStatus, error_msg as errorMsg, create_time as createTime, update_time as updateTime FROM ai_api_index WHERE project_id = #{projectId} AND indexed_status = #{indexedStatus}

SELECT id, project_id as projectId, api_id as apiId, api_name as apiName, api_path as apiPath, api_method as apiMethod, api_info as apiInfo, indexed_status as indexedStatus, error_msg as errorMsg, create_time as createTime, update_time as updateTime FROM ai_api_index WHERE project_id = #{projectId} AND api_id = #{apiId}
